The Court noted that Roger Napenas and Rosalia Yumol were not present. Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Zosima Bumatay Mulato Dizon To Unverified Trust Contest Of Carlito Quismorio And Juana Napenas; Point And Authorities And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Richard Canatella appearing for Zosimo Dizon (Successor Trustee and Demurring party). Ted Laguatan appearing for Carlitos Quismorio (Son). Rogelio Sampaga appearing by phone for Roger Napenas and Rosalia Yumol.
The Court stated the tentative ruling on the Motion to Strike. The Motion is denied. The court further stated that the defect of the pleading was corrected by the verified amended petition. The Court on it's own motion struck the provision in the amended petition pertaining to the validation of the purported will without prejudice to the petitioner contesting the will if it shuold be offered for probate in a seperate proceeding. The ruling is also without prejudice to the petitioners evidentiary use of the purported will. The Court is not ruling on the admissability of the purported will.
The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to state a cause of action as to the validity of the general power of attorney and the trust instrument. Mr. Canatella raised the lack of standing issue. The Court denied that issue. The son has standing to bring this petition. The pourover will has not been offered for probate and it is not before the court. The Petitioners have 10 days to file an amended petition. The court will prepare the order. All parties were directed to file all future pleadings pertaining to the trust and power of attorney in the trust case number 289873.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein CSR#4780. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
